name: io.github.codespar/mcp-btg
description: MCP server for BTG Pactual — Brazil's largest investment bank. Pix, Boleto, Account, and Investments (CDB, LCI, LCA, debêntures, funds) via BTG's Developer Portal APIs (OAuth2 + mTLS).

environmentVariables.name: BTG_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: BTG OAuth client_id issued via the Developer Portal after contract onboarding.

environmentVariables.name: BTG_CERT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the mTLS client certificate (.crt or .pem). BACEN mandates mTLS for Pix v2; BTG enforces it across product families.

environmentVariables.name: BTG_KEY_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the mTLS private key (.key or .pem).
